title: Group Mindfulness-Based Therapy for Women with Sexual Desire and Arousal Difficulties: A Randomized Trial
authorCredentials: UBC, Department of Obstetrics and Gynaecology
abstract: RCT of an 8-week group MBT for women with low desire/arousal. Significant improvements in sexual desire, arousal, satisfaction, and overall sexual functioning vs. waitlist.

title: Predictors of Sexual Desire Discrepancies in Couples
abstract: Dyadic study identifying communication, attachment, and stress predictors of desire discrepancies in long-term couples.

title: Loss of Libido (Reduced Sex Drive) — NHS Health A to Z
authorCredentials: UK National Health Service editorial board
abstract: Patient-facing guide to common contributors to loss of libido — relationship factors, mental-health, hormonal change, medication side-effects — and the NHS care pathway.
